coat_colors: fawn to mahogany with black mask and ears

description.overview: Belgian Malinois are elite working dogs used by military and police worldwide. They're intelligent, driven, and need experienced handling.
description.temperament: Malinois are confident, protective, and extremely work-oriented. They bond closely with handlers and need constant mental and physical challenges.
description.health: Generally healthy and athletic. Watch for hip/elbow dysplasia and eye problems.
description.exercise: Extremely high exercise and work needs. Need jobs to do. Not pets for casual owners.

best_for: Those who can provide full-time engagement
verdict.summary: Elite working dogs—NOT family pets for average owners. Malinois need professional-level handling, extensive exercise, and constant work. Only for experienced handlers who understand working dogs.
